heading: Built on Aloha & Craftsmanship
quote: I believe homeowners deserve someone they can trust — someone who shows up, communicates clearly, and takes pride in every project.
body: I'm Adam Marchacos, owner of Ad Value Home Improvement. As a husband and father raising our family here on Kauai, I'm proud to serve this community with honesty, craftsmanship, and aloha. Every project, big or small, gets my personal attention.
